mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, house_id, type, status, department, title_level, family_size, score, request_area, original_house_id, original_house_area, create_time FROM application
SELECT id, user_id, house_id, type, status, department, title_level, family_size, score, request_area, original_house_id, original_house_area, create_time FROM application WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO application(user_id, house_id, type, status, department, title_level, family_size, score, request_area, original_house_id, original_house_area, create_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{houseId}, #{type}, #{status}, #{department}, #{titleLevel}, #{familySize}, #{score}, #{requestArea}, #{originalHouseId}, #{originalHouseArea}, #{createTime})
